heading: Referendum
label: 4811 Referendum
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1986section 1631 of Pub. L. 99–198section 4801 of this title

children.heading: Continuation of order
children.label: a Continuation of order
children.text: For the purpose of determining whether an order then effect shall be continued during the period beginning not earlier than 24 months after the issuance of the order and ending not later than 30 months after the issuance of the order, the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among persons who have been pork producers and importers during a representative period, as determined by the Secretary.1So in original. Probably should be followed by “in”.1

children.heading: Factors determining continuation; termination of order
children.label: b Factors determining continuation; termination of order

children.text: Such order shall be continued only if the Secretary determines that such order has been approved by not less than a majority of the producers and importers voting in the referendum.

children.label: A
children.text: collection of assessments under the order not later than 6 months after the date of such determination; and

children.label: B
children.text: the order in an orderly manner as soon as practicable after the date of such determination.

children.heading: Reimbursement for cost
children.label: c Reimbursement for cost
children.text: The Secretary shall be reimbursed from assessments collected by the Board for any expenses incurred in connection with a referendum conducted under this section or .section 4812 of this title

children.heading: Manner of conducting
children.label: d Manner of conducting
children.text: A referendum shall be conducted in such manner as prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Amendment of initial order
children.label: e Amendment of initial order
children.text: A referendum to amend the initial order shall be conducted pursuant to this section.
